mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO order_item ( orderNo, prodVariantId, count, price, total, prodNo, productName, optionText, originalPrice, discountRate, shippingFee, sellerUid, itemStatus ) VALUES
( #{item.orderNo}, #{item.prodVariantId}, #{item.count}, #{item.price}, #{item.total}, #{item.prodNo}, #{item.productName}, #{item.optionText}, #{item.originalPrice}, #{item.discountRate}, #{item.shippingFee}, #{item.sellerUid}, #{item.itemStatus} )
mapper.select: SELECT orderItemNo, orderNo, prodVariantId, count, price, total, prodNo, productName, optionText, originalPrice, discountRate, shippingFee, sellerUid, itemStatus FROM order_item WHERE orderNo = #{orderNo}

SELECT oi.orderItemNo, oi.orderNo, o.createdAt, oi.sellerUid, s.companyName AS sellerName, oi.prodNo, oi.productName AS productName, oi.optionText, p.thumb1FileId, oi.count AS quantity, oi.price, oi.total, oi.itemStatus, sh.shipmentNo, sh.courierName, sh.trackingNo, sh.status AS shipmentStatus, EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM review r WHERE r.orderItemNo = oi.orderItemNo ) AS reviewed FROM order_item oi JOIN `order` o ON o.orderNo = oi.orderNo LEFT JOIN product p ON p.prodNo = oi.prodNo LEFT JOIN seller s ON s.uid = oi.sellerUid LEFT JOIN shipment_item si ON si.orderItemNo = oi.orderItemNo LEFT JOIN shipment sh ON sh.shipmentNo = si.shipmentNo WHERE o.memberUid = #{memberUid} AND oi.orderItemNo = #{orderItemNo}
